name: Shadow Drift - Dependency Call Forbidden
failure_mode: A downstream dependency now rejects the delegated call with a forbidden response while the app still appears correctly configured locally.
detection: Use Day 11 token, actor, and dependency telemetry only. The downstream signal is a correlation-linked forbidden call in the current identity path.
remediation: 1. Trace the forbidden call through current-day identity evidence. 2. Patch the current-day actor or token boundary. 3. Re-run the Day 11 verification path.
